message:
Fix Claude CLI stdin blocking for -p mode

Key fix: CLI's -p mode awaits stdin 'end' event via:
  await new Promise((G) => { process.stdin.on("end", G); });

Our stdin implementation only emitted 'end' when resume/read was
called, but the CLI adds an 'end' listener directly. Fixed by
overriding on() in StdinStream to emit 'end' immediately when
adding an 'end' listener on a closed stdin.

Progress:
- --version and --help work perfectly
- CLI initialization now completes all milestones
- CLI produces JSON output in -p mode
- File system reads (sync) work
- Spawn sync commands work with fake responses
- Timers and event loop work correctly
- API key accessible via environment variables

Other fixes:
- Added fs.watch/watchFile/unwatchFile stubs for chokidar
- Added lstat and realpath to fs/promises
- Spoof process.platform/arch as darwin/x64
- Set isTTY: false for pipe mode compatibility
- Added mock localStorage for localforage
- Added nativeStdinReady function
- Improved spawn sync fake responses (security, which)

Remaining: Native async functions throw errors but CLI runs.
